data.content:
Implementation step complete for foolery-48c1 (Rip out compat-status abstractions).

Artifact (remote_main): branch `worktree-foolery-48c1-ripout-compat-status` pushed to origin, commit `24af5f3b`.

Scope of the refactor:
- Deleted the shared compat-status abstraction from Foolery run paths. `WorkflowRuntimeState.compatStatus` is gone; `deriveWorkflowState` now takes `(labels, descriptor?)` only â€” no status fallback in the shared runtime.
- Deleted `src/lib/compat-status-usage.ts` (telemetry was dead) and `src/lib/knots-compat.ts` (bidirectional status maps were unused). Preserved edge-kind constants, metadata key registry, close-target state, and capability flags in new `src/lib/knots-constants.ts`.
- Isolated the remaining beads-local status <-> workflow-state translation into `src/lib/backends/beads-compat-status.ts`. This module exists only because the Beads JSONL backend serializes issues with a generic status string; it is treated as migration debt local to the Beads backend. No Foolery run path outside beads-facing modules imports it.
- Callers `bd-update.ts`, `bd-mutations.ts`, `memory-manager-commands.ts`, `beads-jsonl-dto.ts`, `beads-backend.ts`, `bd-queries.ts` now import from the beads-local module and invoke `mapWorkflowStateToCompatStatus(state)` directly at the persistence boundary.
- `mock-backend-port.ts` no longer rides the compat layer; create/close use workflow descriptor states directly.
- Tests: new `src/lib/backends/__tests__/beads-compat-status.test.ts` and `src/lib/__tests__/knots-constants.test.ts`. `workflows-coverage-*` and `workflows-agnostic` tests were updated for the new `deriveWorkflowState` signature and compatStatus removal.
- Docs: `docs/adr-knots-compatibility.md` and `docs/FOOLERY_AGENT_MEMORY_CONTRACT.md` updated to describe workflow-native convention with Beads-only translation as isolated migration debt.

Verification: `bun run lint`, `bunx tsc --noEmit`, `bun run test` (254 files, 2680 passing), `bun run build` all green.

Constraint check: no replacement generic translation layer; the beads-local module is explicitly scoped to JSONL round-trip only. Workflow-aware logic is used everywhere else.

Note on lease: lease `foolery-ca84` terminated before the completion command could be issued. The step-history entry for `implementation` already shows status `completed` with `to_state: ready_for_implementation`, so the knot is idle again. Tags `commit:24af5f3b` and `branch:worktree-foolery-48c1-ripout-compat-status` were added post-state-advance.
